CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-08-2016 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-11-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
James Kraus, (415)956-8100 for Defendants/Moving parties Ish Harshawat, Kavi Harshawat, Roopam Harshawat and Paras Harshawat.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT ISH HARSHAWAT, KAVI HARSHAWAT, ROOPAM HARSHAWAT, PARAS HARSHAWAT DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with leave to amend. Plaintiff shall file an amended complaint within 10 days of the date of the filing of the Notice of Entry of Order. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-11-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
James Kraus, (415)956-8100 for Defendants/Moving parties Ish Harshawat, Kavi Harshawat, Roopam Harshawat and Paras Harshawat.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT ISH HARSHAWAT, KAVI HARSHAWAT, ROOPAM HARSHAWAT, PARAS HARSHAWAT MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is DENIED as moot.
Order signed in open Court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
